description: Seed injects SNAPSHOT_OFFER and then WANT before MANIFEST/HEADS so the reader rejects the transcript for missing head context
notes: Simulator adds snapshot-sync capability to HELLO, injects SNAPSHOT_OFFER, then injects WANT before MANIFEST or HEADS establish sync roots.
The transcript should fail on the standard prior-MANIFEST-or-HEADS rule, proving that SNAPSHOT_OFFER alone does not unlock WANT.
